segments.text: I will sing of the mercies of the Lord forever; With my mouth will I make known Your faithfulness to all generations.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: Mercy shall be built up forever; Your faithfulness You shall establish in the very heavens.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: I have made a covenant with My chosen, I have sworn to My servant David:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Your seed I will establish forever, And build up your throne to all generations.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the heavens will praise Your wonders, O Lord; Your faithfulness also in the assembly of the saints.
For who in the heavens can be compared to the Lord? Who among the sons of the mighty can be likened to the Lord?
God is greatly to be feared in the assembly of the saints, And to be held in reverence by all those around Him.
O Lord God of hosts, Who is mighty like You, O Lord? Your faithfulness also surrounds You.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: You rule the raging of the sea; When its waves rise, You still them.
You have broken Rahab in pieces, as one who is slain; You have scattered Your enemies with Your mighty arm.
The heavens are Yours, the earth also is Yours; The world and all its fullness, You have founded them.
The north and the south, You have created them; Tabor and Hermon rejoice in Your name.
You have a mighty arm; Strong is Your hand, and high is Your right hand.
Righteousness and justice are the foundation of Your throne; Mercy and truth go before Your face.
Blessed are the people who know the joyful sound! They walk, O Lord, in the light of Your countenance.
In Your name they rejoice all day long, And in Your righteousness they are exalted.
For You are the glory of their strength, And in Your favor our horn is exalted.
For our shield belongs to the Lord, And our king to the Holy One of Israel.
I have given help to one who is mighty; I have exalted one chosen from the people.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have found My servant David; With My holy oil I have anointed him,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: With whom My hand shall be established; Also My arm shall strengthen him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The enemy shall not outwit him, Nor the son of wickedness afflict him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will beat down his foes before his face, And plague those who hate him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But My faithfulness and My mercy shall be with him, And in My name his horn shall be exalted.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Also I will set his hand over the sea, And his right hand over the rivers.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He shall cry to Me, 'You are my Father, My God, and the rock of my salvation.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Also I will make him My firstborn, The highest of the kings of the earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: My mercy I will keep for him forever, And My covenant shall stand firm with him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: His seed also I will make to endure forever, And his throne as the days of heaven.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If his sons forsake My law And do not walk in My judgments,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If they break My statutes And do not keep My commandments,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Then I will punish their transgression with the rod, And their iniquity with stripes.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Nevertheless My lovingkindness I will not utterly take from him, Nor allow My faithfulness to fail.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: My covenant I will not break, Nor alter the word that has gone out of My lips.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Once I have sworn by My holiness; I will not lie to David:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: His seed shall endure forever, And his throne as the sun before Me;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: It shall be established forever like the moon, Even like the faithful witness in the sky.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But You have cast off and abhorred, You have been furious with Your anointed.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: You have renounced the covenant of Your servant; You have profaned his crown by casting it to the ground.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: You have broken down all his hedges; You have brought his strongholds to ruin.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: All who pass by the way plunder him; He is a reproach to his neighbors.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: You have exalted the right hand of his adversaries; You have made all his enemies rejoice.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: You have also turned back the edge of his sword, And have not sustained him in the battle.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: You have made his glory cease, And cast his throne down to the ground.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: The days of his youth You have shortened; You have covered him with shame.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: How long, Lord? Will You hide Yourself forever? Will Your wrath burn like fire?
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: Remember how short my time is; For what futility have You created all the children of men?
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: What man can live and not see death? Can he deliver his life from the power of the grave?
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: Lord, where are Your former lovingkindnesses, Which You swore to David in Your truth?
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: Remember, Lord, the reproach of Your servants— How I bear in my bosom the reproach of all the many peoples,
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: With which Your enemies have reproached, O Lord, With which they have reproached the footsteps of Your anointed.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite

segments.text: Blessed be the Lord forevermore! Amen and Amen.
segments.speaker: Ethan the Ezrahite
